# Zanzibar Exclusive Tours & Safaris

> Award-winning tour operator in Zanzibar, Tanzania since 2002

## Services

- Zanzibar Tours: Full-day and half-day tours including Stone Town, Spice Tours, Prison Island, Safari Blue, Jozani Forest, cultural experiences
- Tanzania Safaris: 1-3 day wildlife safaris to Serengeti, Ngorongoro Crater, Tarangire, Mikumi, Selous
- Holiday Packages: 2-7 day all-inclusive packages combining beach stays with cultural tours
- Airport & Hotel Transfers: 24/7 taxi services with professional drivers

## Contact

- Website: https://zanzibarexclusivetours.com
- Phone: +255 777 411 991
- Email: info@zanzibarexclusivetours.com
- Address: Jumbi, Zanzibar, Tanzania

## Key Features

- Over 20 years of experience
- Multilingual guides (English, French, German, Arabic, Spanish, Polish)
- Licensed and insured
- 24/7 customer support
- Flexible booking options
- Free cancellation available

## Popular Tours

1. Safari Blue - Full-day dhow sailing adventure
2. Stone Town Heritage Tour - UNESCO World Heritage Site exploration
3. Spice Farm Tour - Learn about Zanzibar's spice heritage
4. Jozani Forest - Meet rare Red Colobus monkeys
5. Sunset Dhow Cruise - Romantic sailing experience

## Safari Destinations

- Serengeti National Park - Great Migration & Big Five
- Ngorongoro Crater - World's largest volcanic caldera
- Tarangire National Park - Elephant herds & baobab trees
- Mikumi National Park - Closest safari to Zanzibar
- Selous Game Reserve - Wilderness fly-in safaris
